summary: App with World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control popup buttons in the upper left. Working on improving popup layouts with tailored content layouts and slightly smaller sizing.

existing_features.title: Revise the World Travel popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., section groupings, spacing, dividers), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

Revise the Time Zone popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., timezone list formatting, offset display, section groupings), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

Revise the Global Control popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., control groupings, labeled sections, consistent spacing), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

new_feature_requests.summary: Revise World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control popups: each with a layout tailored to its own content, slightly smaller than current size, with improved structure and spacing
